problem: This adds/backs the user-visible `prctl(PR_GET_SECUREBITS)` and `prctl(PR_SET_SECUREBITS)` behavior, but the Linux compatibility artifact for `prctl` is not updated: `book/src/kernel/linux-compatibility/syscall-flag-coverage/namespaces-cgroups-and-security/prctl.scml` still lists only the keeppcaps capability-related operations. The compatibility docs will under-report the supported `prctl` API.
fix: Update the `prctl.scml` coverage in the same change to include `PR_GET_SECUREBITS` and `PR_SET_SECUREBITS`, with any supported argument constraints for the `securebits` value.
